specific_mechanism: ERGAVG: Birkhoff-Cesaro advantage averaging in PPO. Ā_t = (1/w) Σ A_{t-k}; use Ā_t in policy update. Window w adaptive based on ergodicity diagnostic ρ_w (variance of windowed mean).
llm_application: ERGAVG: at each PPO step, store last w=32 per-token advantage estimates. Compute Ā_t = (1/w) Σ A_{t-k}. Track ergodicity diagnostic ρ_w = Var(Ā over rolling sub-windows)/Var(A). If ρ_w < 0.1, treat as ergodic-like → use Ā for update; else fall back to raw A.
novelty_claim: GAE (1506.02438) already averages exponentially over horizon; ERGAVG specifically uses Cesaro flat-window plus ergodicity diagnostic. Less common but related.
motivation_justification: Birkhoff ergodic theorem requires measure-preserving dynamics; rollouts are not strictly such, so structural transfer.
content_words: policy gradient training step feedback attenuated
rolling sub-window variance ratio variance reduction

llm_side: policy gradient training step feedback attenuated
